# Rain or Shine Roofing

> Licensed and insured residential and commercial roofing contractor based in Springfield, Oregon. Owner-operated by Tim Davis. Serving a 100-mile radius across the I-5 corridor and Oregon Coast.

## Company
- Name: Rain or Shine Roofing
- Owner: Tim Davis (Founder & Lead Roofer)
- License: CCB #198825
- Phone: (541) 606-3306
- Email: tim@expertroofer.net
- Website: https://rainorshine-roofing.com/
- Address: Springfield, OR
- Hours: Monday–Saturday Open 24 Hours, Sunday 10 AM–6 PM
- Status: Licensed, bonded, and insured
- Service Area: 100-mile radius from Springfield, OR — includes Springfield, Eugene, Cottage Grove, Roseburg, Albany, Corvallis, Lebanon, Sweet Home, Florence, Newport, Lincoln City, and Coos Bay

## Services
- Residential Roofing
- Commercial Roofing
- Asphalt Shingle Roofing
- TPO Flat Roofing
- Roof Tear-Off & Replacement
- Roof Rot Repair
- Seamless Gutters (36 color options, fabricated on-site)

## Pages
- [Home](https://rainorshine-roofing.com/): Springfield, OR roofing contractor overview and main services.
- [Services](https://rainorshine-roofing.com/services): Full list of roofing services offered by Rain or Shine Roofing.
- [Residential Roofing](https://rainorshine-roofing.com/services/residential-roofing): Residential roof installation, replacement, and repair.
- [Commercial Roofing](https://rainorshine-roofing.com/services/commercial-roofing): Commercial roofing systems for shops, warehouses, and multi-unit properties.
- [Asphalt Shingle Roofing](https://rainorshine-roofing.com/services/asphalt-shingle-roofing): Architectural and 3-tab asphalt shingle installation.
- [TPO Flat Roofing](https://rainorshine-roofing.com/services/tpo-flat-roofing): Single-ply TPO membrane for flat and low-slope roofs.
- [Roof Tear-Off & Replacement](https://rainorshine-roofing.com/services/roof-tear-off-replacement): Complete roof removal and replacement.
- [Roof Rot Repair](https://rainorshine-roofing.com/services/roof-rot-repair): Rotted sheathing replacement and moisture source repair.
- [Seamless Gutters](https://rainorshine-roofing.com/services/seamless-gutters): On-site fabricated seamless aluminum gutters.
- [Service Area](https://rainorshine-roofing.com/service-area): Cities and communities served within 100 miles of Springfield.
- [About](https://rainorshine-roofing.com/about): About Tim Davis and Rain or Shine Roofing.
- [Contact](https://rainorshine-roofing.com/contact): Contact information and free estimate request form.
